build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 40, 1.5)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(8).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=1.5).rect(56, 36).extrude(20)

STEP 4: Create fin profiles — cq.Workplane("XY").rect(20, 1.5).rotateZ(45)

STEP 5: Position fins — .translate((x, y)) for each of the 8 fins with spacing of 4mm

Final shape will be a rectangular base plate with a central bore and 8 parallel fins extending from it at an angle.
